Off Calendar Oct-02-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2024 Continued To Oct-30-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

FINAL APPROVAL HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-09-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance via Zoom:
J. Kirk Donnelly, Esq., Tel. 760.209.5894, appearing for the plaintiff;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Hearing re: FINAL APPROVAL HEARING. The matter is not contested.

The Court confirms that no class members are present. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff's unopposed Motion for Final Approval of Class Action Settlement and Request for Attorney's Fees and Costs is approved.

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Bailiff: Sr. Deputy Malone. (302/RCE)
